description: MARSYS-JIS Schema Registry — catalog of all load-bearing type schemas

schemas.name: asset_entry
schemas.description: Catalog entry for a corpus asset in the Capability Manifest

schemas.name: query_plan
schemas.description: Structured query plan produced by the Router (C2.1)

schemas.name: tool_bundle
schemas.description: Output of a single retrieval tool invocation

schemas.name: audit_event
schemas.description: Complete execution record per query for the audit trail

schemas.name: panel_metadata
schemas.description: Panel synthesis metadata when panel_mode is active
